raw.subject: Your Newburgh page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love seeing photos of furry friends enjoying a spot of green for the holiday season. Your post about measuring head size for the BarkDanna caught my attention, and I think it showcases the personal touch you bring to pet sitting services in Newburgh.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might mean you're missing out on direct bookings and calls from potential clients looking for a local, trusted pet sitter.

I took a look at your Facebook photos and posts and sketched out a simple homepage idea that highlights your services overview, photo gallery, and contact section, making it easy for visitors to find what they need.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/luckypaws-pet-sitting-newburgh

This is just a starting point, and I'd be happy to discuss building out a website with a flat fee for local businesses like yours. If you're interested in exploring further, feel free to reply or give me a quick call to get started.
You want details.
